calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2018 Continued To Jun-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Gpsc Investments, Llcs Notice Of Application For Default Judgment; Summary Of Case
Off Calendar Apr-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants GlobalClear Investment Co., LLC, a Wyoming limited liability company, Golden Canopy Corporation, a California mutual benefit corporation and Cyrus O'Connor.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Gordon F. Aiavao, CSR #11216. Telephone: 415-509-7557.

Christopher J.C. Waldon, Esq. appeared for plaintiff GPSC Investments, LLC., a California limited liability company.
Michael Scott Close, CEO for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendants GlobalClear Investment Co., LLC, a Wyoming limited liability company, Golden Canopy Corporation, a California mutual benefit corporation and Byrus O'Connor.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on November 30, 2017.
Defaults were entered against defendants GlobalClear Investment Co., LLC, a Wyoming limited liability company and Golden Canopy Corporation, a California mutual benefit corporation, on January 10, 2018.
Default was entered against defendant Cyrus O'Connor on January 17, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 22, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff GPSC Investments, LLC., a California limited liability company, and against the Defaulted Defendants GlobalClear Investment Co., LLC, a Wyoming limited liability company, Golden Canopy Corporation, a California mutual benefit corporation and Cyrus O'Connor, as follows:

Damages - $1,000,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $48,492.69.
Attorney Fees - $19,272.85.
Costs - $1,314.45.

Total - $1,069,079.99.

Proposed judment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
